name: QuickBooks
description: QuickBooks Online Accounting API provides access to small business accounting data. Manage invoices, customers, payments, expenses, and financial reports programmatically.

capabilities.name: create_invoice
capabilities.description: Create a new invoice for a customer with line items, tax, and due date. Supports custom fields, discounts, and multiple currencies.

capabilities.name: query_invoices
capabilities.description: Query invoices using SQL-like syntax. Filter by customer, date range, status, and amount. Returns paginated results.

capabilities.name: create_customer
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record with contact information, billing address, payment terms, and tax settings.

capabilities.name: record_payment
capabilities.description: Record a payment received from a customer. Link it to one or more invoices to mark them as paid.

capabilities.name: create_expense
capabilities.description: Record a business expense or purchase. Categorize it by account, attach receipts, and assign to a vendor.

capabilities.name: get_profit_loss_report
capabilities.description: Generate a Profit and Loss (income statement) report for a given date range. Shows revenue, expenses, and net income.

capabilities.name: query_accounts
capabilities.description: Query the chart of accounts to list all financial accounts. Filter by account type, name, or classification.
